This market will resolve according to how much "Entity A[identifying quotation removed]Daily Box Office Performance[identifying quotation removed] tab on this movie's Entity B (https://www.the-Entity B.com/) page will be used to resolve this market once the values for the 3-day opening weekend ( relative-date-1 - relative-date-2 ) are final (i.e., not studio estimates). If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket. Please note, this market will resolve according to the Entity B figures provided under Weekend Box Office Performance for the 3-day weekend (which typically includes Thursday's previews), regardless of whether domestic refers to only the USA, or to USA and Canada, etc. If there is ambiguity as to whether the resolution source's figures are final, this market will remain open until both https://www.boxofficemojo.com/ and https://www.the-Entity B.com/ have confirmed their finalized figures. If there is no final data available by relative-date-3 , specified-time ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

question: Will "Entity A" Opening Weekend Box Office be between 40m and 45m?
